stories.title: Aaron Judge First to 15 HR — Eyes Career 400 Milestone

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Aaron Judge is the first player in MLB to reach 15 home runs in 2026. On pace for 64 HRs this season.

But the bigger story? He's approaching 400 career HRs — which would make him only the 4th Yankee to join Babe Ruth, Mickey Mantle, and Lou Gehrig in that club. #Yankees #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Judge at 15 HR in 2026. Murakami was right there at 14. The race is officially on.

First to 20? First to 30? And quietly — who gets to 400 career first?

The baseball summer has some excellent storylines. #Yankees #WhiteSox #MLB

article.headline: Aaron Judge First to 15 HR in 2026, Chasing a Yankees Legacy Milestone

stories.title: Cubs Accomplish Historic Feat With Second 10-Game Win Streak — 26-12

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
The Cubs just completed their SECOND 10-game win streak of the season.

The last team to do that through their first 40 games? The 1955 Brooklyn Dodgers.

Chicago is 26-12, 15-game Wrigley winning streak, 20-3 in their last 23. This team is something special. #Cubs #MLB

article.headline: Cubs Complete Second 10-Game Win Streak — First Team Since 1955 Dodgers to Do It

stories.title: Travis Bazzana Hits First MLB Home Run — No. 1 Pick Continues to Arrive

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Travis Bazzana — No. 1 pick in the 2024 MLB Draft — just hit his first career MLB home run in a Guardians win over the Twins.

First hit. Now first homer. The No. 1 pick is arriving fast. #Guardians #MLB

stories.title: MLB Milestones Roundup — Moniak Multi-HR Record, Yankees Sweep History

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: This week's wildest MLB stats: Mickey Moniak had 4 multi-HR games in the Rockies' first 35 (2nd in MLB history). The Yankees swept the O's by 5+ runs every game (3rd time in franchise history). Nick Kurtz walked in 20 straight, tying Barry Bonds for 2nd all-time. #MLB

stories.title: Braves Lead NL at 26-12 — Sustained Excellence After Hot Start

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The Atlanta Braves are 26-12 and leading the NL East with the best run-scoring offense in baseball: 5.61 runs per game.

The Cubs get most of the headlines right now, but don't sleep on Atlanta. They are building something. #Braves #MLB

stories.title: Weekend MLB Preview — Big Series, HR Race Check

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Weekend MLB check: Judge leads the HR race at 15. The Cubs are on a 15-game Wrigley win streak. The Braves are NL's best at 26-12. The Yankees are 26-12 in the AL East.

Every game this weekend has playoff implications. What a season. #MLB #Baseball
